---
name: Prompt Improvement Proposal
about: 'Use this issue template when you want to propose an improvement to an existing
  prompt. '
title: Prompt Improvement Proposal
labels: enhancement
assignees: stefibub

---

## Prompt
Link to the prompt or copy-paste it.

## Suggested improvement
Describe what could be improved in the prompt.

## Proposed change
If possible, suggest an updated version of the prompt or describe the change you recommend.

## Improved Output 
Explain the differences between the original output and the enhanced prompt output, highlight differences and areas of improvement.

## Additional context
Add examples, screenshots, or supporting information if helpful.
